title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.860 - Enforcement of registered determination
text:
452.860.  Enforcement of registered determination. — 1.  A court of this state may grant any relief normally available under the provisions of the laws of this state to enforce a registered child custody determination made by a court of another state.
  2.  A court of this state shall recognize and enforce, but shall not modify, except in accordance with sections 452.740 to 452.845, a registered child custody determination of another state.
(L. 2009 H.B. 481)
